title: Igneous Rocks
script_summary: Explore the fascinating world of igneous rocks and their formation.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about igneous rocks than social media does.
Igneous rocks form from molten rock, or magma, cooling down. But how does that happen?
When magma erupts as lava, it cools quickly, creating volcanic rocks like basalt. But underground, it cools slowly, forming granite.
These rocks can tell us Earth's history, revealing past eruptions and the planet's interior.
So next time you see a rock, remember the fiery journey it took to get there.
Curious about more Earth secrets? Hit like and follow for more science!
